violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was (400) parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be (200-300) ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025

(Egg and Cheese Sandwich ) was observed held at (111) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of sandwich.Establishment to monitor temperatures for hot held food Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025

Inspector observed deli meats being stored in walk in cooler exceeding the 7 days datemarking.PIC informed and voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (can opener base and hoods ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items(pallets and crates were observed in the (outside back refuse ) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025
